meta.title: Donate
meta.description: Support MMTUK's mission to promote understanding of Modern Monetary Theory. Your donation funds independent research, education programmes and community outreach across the UK.

hero.heading: Support modern economics
hero.tagline: Join our mission to advance progressive economic thinking through research, collaboration, and innovative funding strategies.

founder_section.heading: founder member scheme
founder_section.tagline: Calling 100 visionary donors to make a difference
founder_section.body: Be among the first 100 donors to contribute £100 or more within 100 days and be recognised as a founding supporter of MMTUK.

founder_cta.heading: fuel our foundations
founder_cta.button_label: Join as a Founder Member of MMTUK

research_donations.heading: research Donations
research_donations.body: Support our research projects. Every contribution drives meaningful change.

pricing.heading: Research Donation levels
pricing.tagline: Choose a contribution that matches your commitment to economic research

thank_you.heading: thank you for Transforming economics with us
thank_you.body: Your contribution matters. Help us reshape economic understanding through collaborative, progressive research.
